title: 九九の名を持つ星々たち

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
When you hear the words "memorable
generation," which Umamusume come to mind?

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
The Eternal Top Three, BNW, the Golden
Generation—a variety of racers have brilliantly
decorated the past generations.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
With that, I'd like to introduce four dazzling stars
that are currently making quite a buzz in the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Do you have a minute—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh... Were you watching TV?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I got asked to go partner running.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Um...
P-p-pweeeeaaase!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uh... I-I... I became race-ready far later than
everyone else, so... I couldn't run in the Classics...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... but now... I want to start running with Ayabe! Like, running running! Lots and lots!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I want to run a bunch...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: So, um... would that, errr... be okay?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'd like to run with you more, too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You'd be fine with that... right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So, we head to the track with Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's that over there?! The way it sparkles is
indescribable... C-could it be?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What are you doing here, Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! You called?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wait. Should I have remained silent and hidden
myself? Or should I have toppled over with
surprised joy, seizing this opportunity to create a
moment of comedy?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
What are you on about? Clearly, you made the
decision to come over here.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, now that both Ayabe and Doto are present,
I hear a joyous tune coming to fruition!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Run. And I will run with you. We will all run,
together! As we have done in our junior year, our
classic year, and our senior year!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That we could spend these three years together
and more fills me with a joy impossible to
communicate through song. Do you understand,
Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Sure.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I guess it might be fun to play along with the
self-proclaimed Centurial Overlord... just once.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha ha! How about it then? Show me what
you've got, first-magnitude star!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After T.M. Opera O joins, the three finish
warming up.
Oh! Is everyone going to run together?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well now! That voice... Hahaha! Could it be who I
think it is?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Um... are you about to start? I guess it might be
annoying to add someone else now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her hesitation, "I want to run!" is clearly
written all over her face. I smile and reply.
choice_data_list: It shouldn't be a problem. Right?
It shouldn't be a problem. Right?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...You too now?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to miss a chance to run with you and
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I decided I'm going to keep at it. Besides, I...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You what?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to lose. And I know you all are
thinking the same.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want all of us to keep winning
together!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Let's run, Ayabe! And I'll win!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Not if I can help it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the four take off, full of energy, as I
watch on in amazement.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O, Meisho Doto, Narita Top Road,
and Admire Vega...

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
These four stars who shine bright on the turf are
sure to shine on in the future as well.
P-p-pweeeeaaase!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uh... I-I... I became race-ready far later than
everyone else, so... I couldn't run in the Classics...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... but now... I want to start running with Ayabe! Like, running running! Lots and lots!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I want to run together a whole bunch...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: So, um... would that, errr... be okay?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'd like to run with you more, too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You'd be fine with that... right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So, we head to the track with Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's that over there?! The way it sparkles is
indescribable... C-could it be?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What are you doing here, Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! You called?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wait. Should I have remained silent and hidden
myself? Or should I have toppled over with
surprised joy, seizing this opportunity to create a
moment of comedy?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
What are you on about? Clearly, you made the
decision to come over here.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, now that both Ayabe and Doto are present,
I hear a joyous tune coming to fruition!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Run. And I will run with you. We will all run,
together! As we have done in our junior year, our
classic year, and our senior year!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That we could spend these three years together
and more fills me with a joy impossible to
communicate through song. Do you understand,
Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Sure.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I guess it might be fun to play along with the
self-proclaimed Centurial Overlord... just once.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha ha! How about it then? Show me what
you've got, first-magnitude star!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O, the Centurial Overlord, laughs
loudly with confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega looks at me with approval, so I go
and add her name to the partner running list.
P-p-pweeeeaaase!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uh... I-I... I became race-ready far later than
everyone else, so... I couldn't run in the Classics...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... but now... I want to start running with Ayabe! Like, running running! Lots and lots!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I want to run together a whole bunch...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: So, um... would that, errr... be okay?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'd like to run with you more, too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You'd be fine with that... right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn off the TV and follow the two of them out
of my office to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the sidelines, I see hope in Admire Vega's
face... She truly wants to enjoy this day running
together with her rival.
